meta.title: Jae Method | Honest Car Buying in Raleigh
meta.description: Find your perfect car with Seungkook Jae. No pressure, honest service. Korean & English. Fred Anderson Kia, Raleigh NC.

hero.tagline: Your honest car advisor in Raleigh
hero.subtitle: No pressure. No games. Just the right car for your life.

story.title: How I Got Here
story.content: I did my two years in the Korean military, then came to America by myself. No family here, no safety net. I got scammed. I made bad decisions because I didn't know better and had nobody to ask. But all of that taught me one thing: when you're far from home and don't have the right information, the only thing that matters is whether you can trust the person sitting across from you. Now I work at a dealership, and I see people every day who are in the same spot I was — navigating something complicated in a language that isn't theirs. I know what that feels like, and I don't want anyone to go through what I went through.

values.title: Why Work With Me
values.honestDesc: I'll tell you the truth about every car — even if it means I don't make a sale.
values.noPressureDesc: Take your time. I'm here to help, not push.
values.bilingualDesc: Comfortable in both languages. 한국어로 편하게 상담하세요.
values.personalDesc: I remember your name, your family, and what matters to you.

q3.question: What do you do for fun?

q6.question: Which features matter to you?
q6.hint: Select all that apply — the more you pick, the better I can match you.

options.premium_audio: Premium Sound System (Harman Kardon, Bose, etc.)

q7.question: What's your monthly payment budget?
q7.hint: Quick rule: every $1,000 financed ≈ $20/month. So a $20K car ≈ $400/mo, a $30K car ≈ $600/mo.
